title: Steam Machine Launch Priced at $1,049
summary: Valve launches its Steam Machine console at an initial price of $1,049 in the US and €1,039 in Europe, generating mixed opinions on its value for money.

title: Microsoft and Chevron Plan the Largest Natural Gas-Powered Data Center in Texas
summary: The companies will build a 2-gigawatt data center with its own gas plant to avoid overloading the electrical grid.

title: Google DeepMind Invests $75 Million in A24 for AI Film Research
summary: The agreement aims to develop AI tools for film production and audiovisual content.

title: Anthropic's AI Model Mythos Sparks Controversy After Alleged Access to NSA Classified Systems
summary: OpenAI and other companies respond to the advances of Mythos, which poses serious security challenges in artificial intelligence.

title: Lucid Motors Lays Off 18% of Its Workforce in an Effort to Streamline the Company
summary: The electric vehicle manufacturer reduces its workforce and suffers a stock drop after the announcement.

title: Ukraine Integrates AI into All Its Military Drones with Palantir's Avenger Lab System
summary: The country uses autonomous tank-robots to minimize sending soldiers to the front line.

title: Memory Crisis Raises Prices of DDR3 and DDR2 Amid DDR4 Shortage
summary: The increase in demand for older memory chips drives up their prices in the components market.

title: 76-Year-Old Woman Dies After a Tesla on Autopilot Crashes into Her Home in Texas
summary: An accident captured by a doorbell camera reignites the debate over the safety of Tesla's Autopilot system.

title: Police Officers Arrested for Using Flock System to Harass Women
summary: The misuse of the license plate recognition platform highlights the need for court orders to access this data.

title: Getty Images and OpenAI Sign Agreement to Include Licensed Photos in ChatGPT
summary: The agreement allows ChatGPT to display Getty images in its search results, boosting the company's stock value.

title: Alan Greenspan, Former Chairman of the US Federal Reserve, Dies
summary: Greenspan, known for his influence on financial markets, leaves a legacy in global monetary policy.

title: Advances in Social Media Regulation for Minors in the US and UK
summary: Both countries seek to protect children online through laws that restrict access to platforms and strengthen security.

title: Canada and China Boost Nuclear Energy with New Reactors and the Zhuri Fusion Reactor
summary: Both countries advance nuclear projects to meet energy demand and reduce dependence on fossil fuels.

title: The Football World Cup Generates Commercial Expectations and Debates on Bar Terraces
summary: Companies like DoorDash seek to capitalize on the event while in Spain there is debate over the presence of screens on terraces.

title: Artificial Intelligence Transforms YouTube and TikTok with Automatically Generated Content
summary: The increase in AI-generated content on social platforms generates criticism and concern among users and executives.

title: Windows 11 Reports Hibernation Issues and Crashes After Latest Update
summary: Hibernation wears out SSDs without warning, while a recent update affects Office, OneDrive, and File Explorer.

title: Google Prepares Audio Memory for Pixel While Android 17 Causes Touch Issues
summary: The new ambient recording feature coexists with touch and freezing bugs in the latest version of Android for Pixel.

title: Five Eyes Alliance Warns About the Potential of AI Models in Cyber Attacks
summary: Canada carries out a pioneering operation to clean devices infected with botnets amid growing cyber threats.

title: INTERPOL and Experts Warn of Rise in AI and Phishing Scams in Asia-Pacific
summary: Scams related to the World Cup and other phishing campaigns become harder to detect.

title: 'Vibecoding' Consolidates as a Trial in Software Acquisitions While Job Insecurity is Criticized
summary: New trends in software development and complaints about the state of tech employment mark the sector's current affairs.
